message:
Update beads issue tracker with 19 new performance and architecture tasks

Add new beads entries covering:
- Lock-free flat hash page cache to replace 128 Mutex<HashMap> shards,
  replicating C SQLite's pcache1 pattern for 3-7x lower page lookup cost
- B-tree cursor performance improvements and structural refinements
- Additional dependency tracking and status updates for existing issues

Also updates legacy_sqlite_code/sqlite submodule pointer to reflect
current working state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
